name: Green Chile Wontons Tspn00b
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the shredded cheese, diced green chiles, and jalapeno peppers; stir well.
2. Working with one wonton skin at a time, spoon about 1 1/2 teaspoons of the cheese mixture into the center of each wonton.
3. Moisten the edges of the wonton lightly with water.
4. Fold the wonton in half to form a triangle, pressing the edges together to seal.
5. Repeat the procedure with the remaining wonton skins and cheese mixture.
6. Chill for 20 minutes.
7. Fry the wontons in a small amount of hot oil (375°F) until golden brown, turning once.
8. Drain on paper towels.
9. Sprinkle with salt.
10. Serve with avocado dip.
Yield: 6-1/2 dozen
